Cloud Security Engineer

Infrastructure Defense & Security-as-Code Roadmap

01. Identity & Access Governance

Zero Trust Architecture Core

Moving beyond perimeters to verify every request. Implementing Identity-Aware Proxies and micro-segmentation.

Advanced IAM Engineering Core

Complex Permission Boundaries, Attribute-Based Access Control (ABAC), and JIT (Just-In-Time) access elevating.

02. Infrastructure Protection (IaC Security)

Policy as Code (OPA/Rego) Essential

Writing declarative security policies to enforce compliance across Terraform and Kubernetes deployments.

Shift-Left Scanning Essential

Integrating Checkov, Tfsec, and KICS into GitOps pipelines to block insecure resource provisioning.

03. Secrets & Data Security

Vault & Secret Orchestration Expert

Deploying HashiCorp Vault for dynamic secrets, encryption engines, and lifecycle rotation of service credentials.

Data Sovereignty & Encryption Expert

Managing KMS Key Policies, Hardware Security Modules (HSM), and envelope encryption at scale.

04. Supply Chain & Workload Security

Container Integrity Specialist

Implementing Image Signing (Cosign), SBOM generation, and runtime threat detection with Falco.

Threat Modeling & Auditing Specialist

Conducting STRIDE assessments and automating continuous compliance auditing (AWS Config/Azure Policy).

HEXADIGITALL.COM
